ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "cohort_name" TEXT /* Name of the cohort (e.g., NSCLC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, interventional) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., randomized controlled trial, case-control study) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_entries" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cohort associated with the record */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution where the visit occurred */,
  "md_visit_number" INTEGER /* Visit number for the patient */,
  "md_onc_visit_int" INTEGER /* Oncology visit interval in days */,
  "dx_md_visit_days" INTEGER /* Days since diagnosis at the time of visit */,
  "dx_md_visit_mos" REAL /* Months since diagnosis at the time of visit */,
  "dx_md_visit_yrs" REAL /* Years since diagnosis at the time of visit */,
  "md_type_ca_cur" TEXT /* Current cancer type status */,
  "md_ca" TEXT /* Details about cancer presence or absence */,
  "md_ca_status" TEXT /* Current cancer status */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version of the data release */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., follow-up, baseline) */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms observed during the visit */,
  "vital_signs" TEXT /* Vital signs recorded during the visit (e.g., temperature, blood pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_entries_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_entries_md_ca_status FOREIGN KEY ("md_ca_status") REFERENCES cancer_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_entries_release_version FOREIGN KEY ("release_version") REFERENCES release_versions ("release_version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_entries_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_entries_institution FOREIGN KEY ("institution") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_timelines" (
  "timeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic timeline record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit record associated with the diagnostic timeline */,
  "dx_days" INTEGER /* Days since diagnosis */,
  "dx_mos" REAL /* Months since diagnosis */,
  "dx_yrs" REAL /* Years since diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "disease_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the disease at diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_timelines_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES record_entries ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer status (e.g., Stable, Progressing) */,
  "status_category" TEXT /* Category of the cancer status (e.g., stable, progressing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of data release */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the record was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES record_entries ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit record associated with the treatment plan */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_protocol" TEXT /* Treatment protocol followed (e.g., chemotherapy, radiation therapy) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES record_entries ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical outcome record */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan associated with the outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical outcome */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was evaluated */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., complete response, partial response) */,
  "response_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the response in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_outcomes_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_protocol" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the study protocol */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the study protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocol_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit in the protocol */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study protocol */,
  "visit_number" INTEGER /* Number of the visit in the protocol */,
  "visit_description" TEXT /* Description of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocol_visits_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES study_protocol ("protocol_id")
)
